name: IKIRYO
title: SPIRIT OF VENGEANCE

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Death Touch
actions.effects: Damage from this attack is irreducible. If the target is killed, this model and the crew's leader heal 2.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (soulstone). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Shatter Soul
actions.effects: Summon a Seishin in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Death Curse
actions.effects: Enemies within range gain an Adversary token. Then, kill this model.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='SPIRIT OF VENGEANCE' back='Spirit of Vengeance'
